---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# A deal with the Spectral Devil

- Typically, Cytometry **"borrows" its algorithms** from other fields, typically single-cell RNA-seq. 

- However, in process of acquiring **immense potential for biological discovery**, SFC made a important **tradeoff**. 

- The **quality of our final dattase** is inherent to our **ability to resolve the fluorophores present** on an individual cell. 

- As a consequence, our **unmixing controls** capacity to **match** the spectral signature of the **respective fluorophore** as seen on **full-stain cells** is critical to the final outcome.
